inputs.label: Mile Time (min)
inputs.businessContext: Time to run/jog one mile in decimal minutes (e.g., 8.5 for 8 minutes 30 seconds).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time to run/jog one mile in decimal minutes (e.g., 8.5 for 8 minutes 30 seconds).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir mili koşma/jogging süresi, ondalık dakika cinsinden (örneğin, 8 dakika 30 saniye için 8.5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit zum Laufen/Joggen einer Meile in Dezimalminuten (z. B. 8,5 für 8 Minuten 30 Sekunden).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps pour courir un mile en minutes décimales (ex. 8,5 pour 8 minutes 30 secondes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo para correr/trotar una milla en minutos decimales (ej., 8.5 para 8 minutos 30 segundos).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت اللازم للجري/الهرولة لمسافة ميل واحد بالدقائق العشرية (مثال: 8.5 تعني 8 دقائق و30 ثانية)

inputs.label: Heart Rate (bpm)
inputs.businessContext: Heart rate at the end of the mile (beats per minute).

businessContext_i18n.en: Heart rate at the end of the mile (beats per minute).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mil sonundaki kalp atış hızı (dakikadaki atış).
businessContext_i18n.de: Herzfrequenz am Ende der Meile (Schläge pro Minute).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque à la fin du mile (battements par minute).
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca al final de la milla (latidos por minuto).
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل ضربات القلب عند نهاية الميل (نبضة في الدقيقة)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
